name: Gingerbread & Sauce
recipeIngredient: fill to 1 cup with boiling water
Grated rind and juice of one orange
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all cake ingredients in a large bowl; mix at medium speed for about 3 minutes.
2. Bake in an 8x8-inch pan for 30 minutes at 350 degrees.
3. For the sauce, place all ingredients in a saucepan and stir until thickened.
